title: Faculty of Dentistry Vision & Mission
content:
Faculty of Dentistry Vision & Mission

OUR MISSION;

By improving the knowledge and skills of our students with the technological infrastructure of our faculty and dental hospital, faculty members and our training program, we create dentists who are knowledgeable about scientific theories and disciplines, responsible, visionary, who will contribute to the development of our country, who are innovative, have high communication power, and respect universal, human and ethical values. Our main aim is to raise

OUR VISION:

As the Faculty of Dentistry, we aim to raise our students as researcher, people-oriented, society-leading individuals who use the academic and technological opportunities required by contemporary science in the light of current innovations, within the understanding of social responsibility and in line with the core values of our university.
